response.justification: The role requires 8 years of C++ programming, 5 years building large-scale infrastructure/distributed systems, and 3 years in software design and architecture for a cloud compute platform. The candidate's background is primarily JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months). There is no demonstrated cloud compute platform experience, no formal technical leadership track record at the scale required, and C++ depth is far below the minimum bar.
strengths: Broad full-stack and polyglot experience across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded
Strong testing, TDD, and software craftsmanship background with teaching/mentoring via workshops
Some distributed/high-throughput exposure at Dunnhumby (millions of req/s with DLang)
concerns: Only ~6 months of C/C++ experience vs. 8-year requirement
No cloud compute platform or large-scale infrastructure leadership experience
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform experience
